name: Isabella Harrington
message: I have a collection of vintage Cartier pieces I'd like to discuss selling. Primarily bracelets and a brooch from the 1970s.
notes: Confirmed via phone. She's bringing 3 pieces. Set up the valuation room.

name: George Pemberton
message: Looking to purchase a Rolex or AP as a long-term investment. Budget around £30,000. Would like to discuss options.

name: Miriam Okafor
message: Inherited a collection of gold jewellery and would like to understand its value before deciding what to do.
notes: Valued 6 pieces. Total estimated £8,200. She'll come back next week to discuss selling 2 of them.
